Max and Ollie

Funding comes from treasurer.

Difficult to get funding.

Legal needs to check

Silos so some work has already been done but you don't know about it.

Just get on with it. So actually getting on with it.

Understand the company is important. The data science needs to be relevant to the company

Massive split around the world. Software development space. 

Collect lots of data, but no direct access.

Different people in different locations.

Restructures can be annoying.
